joke: Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field.
I only know 25 letters of the alphabet. I don't know Y.
Why don't eggs tell jokes? They might crack up.
I told my dog to fetch a stick. He brought back homework.
Why did the math book look sad? Too many problems.
I tried to catch fog once. Mist.
What do you call cheese that isn't yours? Nacho cheese.
Why did the bike fall over? It was two-tired.
I'm reading a book on glue. I'm stuck on it.
Why did the cookie go to the doctor? It felt crummy.
I asked my hat to stay. It went on ahead.
Why did the golfer bring two pants? In case of a hole in one.
What did one wall say to the other? I'll meet you at the corner.
I told my clock a joke. It ticked me off.
Why don't skeletons fight? They don't have the guts.
I gave my alarm clock a raise. It worked overtime.
Why did the banana wear sunscreen? It peeled.
I tried to play hide and seek with mountains. They peaked.
What do clouds wear? Thunderwear.
I opened a bakery for dogs. I sell pup-cakes.
Why was the broom late? It swept in.
I ate a clock yesterday. Very time-consuming.
Why did the pencil nap? It was tired of drawing.
I told my shoes a joke. They laced with laughter.
What did the ocean say? Nothing, it waved.
Why did the tomato blush? It saw the salad dressing.
I tried to write a joke about paper. It was tear-able.
Why don't crabs share? They're shellfish.
I told my fridge a joke. It chilled out.
What did the zero say to the eight? Nice belt.
Why did the picture go to jail? It was framed.
I told a joke about stairs. It's on another level.
Why did the cow wear bells? Its horn didn't work.
I tried to play piano with mittens. No keys.
What do you call a sleeping bull? A bulldozer.
Why was the computer cold? It left its windows open.
I told my backpack a joke. It carried on.
Why did the scarecrow smile? He felt stuffed.
What did the grape do when stepped on? Let out a little wine.
Why was six afraid of seven? Because seven eight nine.
I told my calendar a joke. Its days were numbered.
Why did the duck get detention? He quacked jokes.
I tried to catch a squirrel. It was nuts.
Why was the broom proud? It swept awards.
I told my phone a joke. It lost signal.
Why did the paper yawn? It was sheet-tired.
I made a joke about candy. It was sweet.
Why did the shoe go to school? To get smarter.
I told my lunch a joke. It cracked me up.
Why did the orange stop? It ran out of juice.
I told my plants jokes. They grew on me.
Why did the clock sit on the shelf? It needed time out.
I tried to make bread laugh. It loafed.
What did the bee say? Buzz off.
Why did the notebook smile? It felt noted.
I told my shoes a secret. They kept it tied.
Why did the snowman grin? He saw snow jokes.
I told a joke about air. It blew over.
Why did the pen feel proud? It made a point.
I told my mirror a joke. It reflected on it.
Why did the pillow laugh? It cracked up.
I told my spoon a joke. It stirred laughter.
Why did the lamp giggle? It felt light.
I told my sandwich a joke. It was bready funny.
Why did the door blush? It got knocked on.
I told my wallet a joke. It emptied.
Why did the cookie smile? It felt chipper.
I told my pencil a joke. It drew laughs.
Why did the car grin? It felt driven.
I told my bed a joke. It rested easy.
Why did the hat laugh? It was on top.
I told my socks a joke. They rolled with it.
Why did the soap laugh? It slipped up.
I told my shoes again. They still tied.
Why did the chicken join a band? It had drumsticks.
I told my watch a joke. It ticked loudly.
Why did the book laugh? It had a good spine.
I told my chair a joke. It sat with it.
Why did the apple stop? Core issue.
I told my doorbell a joke. Ding dong.
Why did the ladder laugh? It climbed humor.
I told my hat again. It stayed put.
Why did the shoe smile? It fit in.
I told my ruler a joke. It measured laughs.
Why did the fence laugh? It got posted.
I told my dog a joke. He pawsed.
Why did the cloud smile? It felt light.
I told my spoon twice. Still stirring.
Why did the pillow grin? It felt comfy.
I told my shirt a joke. It wrinkled.
Why did the bell laugh? It rang true.
I told my lamp again. Still bright.
Why did the shoe relax? It took a sole break.
I told my keys a joke. They jingled.
Why did the plate laugh? It cracked.
I told my socks again. Still paired.
Why did the fridge smile? It felt cool.
I told my calendar twice. Same date.
Why did dad smile? These jokes worked.
What's brown and sticky? A stick!
